description.value: You infuse another creature with your divine aura, causing the target to radiate an aura identical to your own clerical aura. The targetâs actual alignment is not changed, but spells like detect evil or detect good detect only the aura, not the creatureâs actual alignment. For the duration of this spell, effects influenced by the targetâs alignment function according to the imposed aura, not the creatureâs actual aura. When the spell ends, the targetâs aura returns to normal, and alignment -affecting magic affects it according to its actual alignment.
